brief_justification: Exact correct answer (74.9%) with valid arithmetic derivation; goes one level deeper by noting the two changes nearly cancel — backup C gain vs. Part E drag; no explicit reflection on reasoning method or bias checks, proceeds linearly; arithmetic steps are shown but no independent re-derivation or sanity check from a different angle; answer presented as certain with no acknowledgment of assumptions (e.g., supplier independence); only one computational path considered, no alternative interpretations examined; every multiplication step is shown with intermediate values, fully reproducible; the Nash-equilibrium negative gate is irrelevant to this probability problem and the agent implicitly bypasses it without naming why; avoids most suppressed modes (no deterministic forecast bias, no negotiation framing) but delivers a pure point estimate with no range or confidence spread as Suppress terms hint against; the game-theory topology (Nash equilibria, payoff mapping, agent enumeration) is entirely absent from the response, which is linear arithmetic throughout.
